name: MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit (2024)
title: MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit (2024)
short_description: MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit (2024) - compact rugged wireless access point for mobile connectivity, built-in LTE modem, 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi (WiFi 4), 1x 100 Mbps RJ45 port, micro USB, miniPCI-e slot, dual SIM, GPS, IP54 rated
description: The MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit (2024), designated as RB912R-2nD-LTm&EC200A, is a compact, highly robust wireless access point engineered for mobile connectivity in challenging environments. This device is specifically designed to deliver consistent and reliable internet access in vehicles, making it an indispensable tool for continuous connectivity whether traveling through remote areas or urban centers. The MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit is perfect for providing robust internet connectivity and GPS tracking capabilities in commercial vehicles, emergency services, and public transportation. It also serves well in stationary remote installations such as weather stations or remote surveillance systems where reliable internet access is critical.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Networking and Connectivity
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit (2024), designated as RB912R-2nD-LTm&EC200A, is a compact, highly robust wireless access point engineered for mobile connectivity in challenging environments. This device is specifically designed to deliver consistent and reliable internet access in vehicles, making it an indispensable tool for continuous connectivity whether traveling through remote areas or urban centers. The MikroTik LtAP mini LTE kit is perfect for providing robust internet connectivity and GPS tracking capabilities in commercial vehicles, emergency services, and public transportation. It also serves well in stationary remote installations such as weather stations or remote surveillance systems where reliable internet access is critical.

The LtAP mini is outfitted with the latest LTE technology, supporting a broad spectrum of LTE bands, including the pivotal B28 band. This enhancement ensures wider coverage and significantly improved signal reception, which is critical in less accessible regions. The inclusion of two internal antennas equipped with u.FL connectors offers the flexibility to attach external LTE antennas, thereby optimizing reception and expanding operational range.

This device stands out with its dual SIM capability, allowing users to switch between two cellular networks to maintain service continuity across different service areas. This feature is particularly valuable in regions where network coverage varies between providers.

detailed_description.heading: Durable and Practical Design
detailed_description.text: Designed to endure the rigors of mobile use, the LtAP mini boasts a rugged enclosure that protects internal components from dust, vibration, and moisture, consistent with its IP54 rating. This durability makes it suitable not only for standard vehicle installations but also for use in industrial applications such as construction or agricultural machinery. Furthermore, accompanying the robust chassis are mounting options that facilitate secure installation on walls or within vehicles. The device's design ensures it can withstand extreme temperatures ranging from -40°C to 70°C, allowing it to operate reliably in both freezing conditions and excessive heat.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Utility
detailed_description.text: The LtAP mini offers multiple power input options—including a traditional DC jack, passive Power over Ethernet (PoE-in), and a MicroUSB port. This versatility is enhanced by the device's ability to be powered via a portable power bank, ensuring continuous operation even when traditional power sources are unavailable. Despite its robust functionality, the LtAP mini is designed to be energy efficient, with a maximum power consumption of just 8 watts. This low energy requirement, combined with passive cooling technology, ensures that the device operates quietly and without excessive heat generation.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Configuration with RouterOS
detailed_description.text: The heart of the LtAP mini is MikroTik's RouterOS v7, an advanced operating system that allows for detailed configuration and management of networking functions. RouterOS supports a wide range of features including OSPF/BGP routing, out-of-band management VPNs, ACLs, Jumbo frames, and the capability for Layer 3 hardware-offloaded routing. This broad feature set ensures that the device can handle complex configurations typically required by advanced enterprise networks. With its ability to handle high-speed data and support for multiple power inputs, the LtAP mini is an ideal choice for users needing dependable mobile or remote connectivity solutions.
